violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per PIC sweep will be placed on door. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025

Wood is used in the construction of the grease rap base. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. PIC stated wood will be wrapped with stainless steel. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air gap poster provided. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. PIC stated closing arm will be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025
